local_results.title: Desnudo Coffee: East Austin
local_results.description: Friendly staff at this truck serving artisanal espresso drinks made with fresh-roasted, direct-source beans from Colombia.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Their cappuccino is perfection and the guava matcha is an experience."

local_results.title: Trippy Buck Coffee
local_results.user_review: "Some of the best coffee in Austin with the best staff and great prices."

local_results.title: Summer Moon Coffee
local_results.description: Organic, fair-trade coffee & snacks. Local roaster for wood-fired, fair-trade coffee, pastries & breakfast tacos in a quaint setting.
local_results.user_review: "Friendly staff, amazing matcha latte, and a great chocolate croissant."

local_results.title: Houndstooth Coffee
local_results.address: 4200 N Lamar Blvd Ste 120, Austin, TX 78756
local_results.description: Airy spot for carefully sourced coffee. This chill, airy hangout serves carefully sourced coffees, teas, wines & craft beer, plus snacks.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee was rich and perfectly brewed, and the staff were super friendly."

local_results.title: Merit Coffee Co.
local_results.description: Roastery, coffee shop & baked goods. Specialty coffee shop & roaster with Bakery Lorraine's baked goods & pies, tacos, juices & donuts.
local_results.user_review: "Excellent coffee, friendly service, fast wifi, highly recommended!"

local_results.title: Idlewild Coffee
local_results.description: Coffee, espresso and latte shop attached to a skate shop that also serves muffins and sandwiches.
local_results.user_review: "The baristas were so friendly and made us some delicious macchiatos."

local_results.title: Cosmic Pickle
local_results.description: Craft beer, coffee & food trucks. Specialty coffee, local beers, craft cocktails & live music, plus food trucks in a garden setting.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee was to die for here and service was amazing."

local_results.title: Figure 8 Coffee Purveyors
local_results.description: Cozy coffee shop serving breakfast and pastries, plus wine.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee is consistently excellent, carefully crafted, and full of flavor."

local_results.title: Flightpath Coffeehouse
local_results.description: Tranquil cafe with locally made eats. This hip, art-adorned coffee shop serving locally sourced snacks is known for its tranquil vibe.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Delicious coffee, great staff, and lots of working space."

local_results.title: Cielito Lindo Cafe
local_results.user_review: "Perfect blend of roasted coffee beans and ingredients."

local_results.title: Fleet Coffee
local_results.description: Cozy spot for java & light bites. Petite cafe serving classic & inventive coffee drinks, plus local tacos & pastries.
local_results.user_review: "Excellent cold brew, super friendly staff, and a lovely patio."

local_results.title: Revolución
local_results.address: 207 San Jacinto Blvd Ste 200, Austin, TX 78701
local_results.description: Cozy eatery serving organic breakfast staples such as granola bowls and breakfast tacos, plus coffee, juice and smoothies.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The coffee was amazing, service was great, and the atmosphere was laid back"

local_results.title: Cherrywood Coffeehouse
local_results.description: Chill cafe for eclectic eats & free yoga. Eclectic eats from tacos to muffalettas in an art-adorned counter-serve cafe, plus free yoga.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee is rich and flavorful, and the pastries are fresh and delicious."

local_results.title: Bennu Coffee
local_results.address: 2001 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Austin, TX 78702
local_results.description: Chill, eco-friendly cafe open 24/7. Relaxed 24-hour coffee house serving sustainable, fair trade coffee & locally sourced food.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee was excellent, and the staff was incredibly welcoming."

local_results.title: Odd Roots Coffee
local_results.user_review: "The staff were extremely friendly and the coffee was tasty."

local_results.title: Noble Joe Coffee Co.
local_results.address: Southshore Eatery Food Truck Park, 1620 E Riverside Dr, Austin, TX 78741
local_results.description: Restored 1940s coffee truck providing drinks, breakfast, and tacos in a dog-friendly courtyard.
local_results.user_review: "Can’t beat the amazing coffee, friendly staff, and prime location."

local_results.title: Simona's Coffee + Cocktails
local_results.description: Sophisticated spot for coffee and cocktails plus snacks, with a relaxed vibe.
local_results.user_review: "The ambiance is quite pleasant and the coffee is of exceptional quality."

local_results.title: Better Half Coffee & Cocktails
local_results.description: Global fare, coffee, and cocktails. Cafe with globally inspired fare, plus coffee, draft cocktails, wine, craft ciders, and beer.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee is top-notch, made with high-quality beans and expertly brewed."

local_results.title: Idlewild Coffee
local_results.description: Coffee bar in the SXSW Headquarters serving espresso and quick bites in a trendy space.
local_results.user_review: "The coffee is delicious and the baristas are so helpful and friendly!"

local_results.title: Monkey Nest Coffee
local_results.description: Neighborhood WiFi cafe with live music. Artsy hangout serving fair-trade coffee & healthy eats in a large space with free WiFi & live music.
local_results.user_review: "Excellent coffee in a sweet, charming atmosphere."
